items.q: Which tv show features the character Phil Dunphy?
items.explanation: Phil Dunphy is associated with Modern Family.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Rachel Green.
items.explanation: Rachel Green is strongly linked to Friends.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Mandalorian?
items.explanation: Din Djarin is one of the defining characters in The Mandalorian.

items.q: The character Logan Roy appears in Succession.
items.explanation: Logan Roy is a key character in Succession.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Rust Cohle.
items.explanation: Rust Cohle is strongly linked to True Detective.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Peaky Blinders?
items.explanation: Tommy Shelby is one of the defining characters in Peaky Blinders.

items.q: The character Harvey Specter appears in House of the Dragon.
items.explanation: Harvey Specter appears in Suits, not House of the Dragon.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Jerry Seinfeld.
items.explanation: Jerry Seinfeld is strongly linked to Seinfeld.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The X-Files?
items.explanation: Fox Mulder is one of the defining characters in The X-Files.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Better Call Saul?
items.explanation: Jimmy McGill is one of the defining characters in Better Call Saul.
